tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Cold or dirty water: switch from standard squarebill to flat-sided crankbait (Chick Magnet). Round bill on circuit board, extremely flat sides that displace a ton of water — gives off sonic images to help bass find it in stained/muddy water. Excels in late fall, early spring, and winter. Standard 1.5 squarebill is better year-round for cover (logs, laydowns, brush, rocks).'
